name: Physics Free Body Diagrams
description: Create a 3-page physics lesson flipchart about Free Body Diagrams (FBDs) in ActivInspire. Page 1 must include the title 'Free Body Diagrams' and subtitle 'Newton's Laws of Motion'. Page 2, titled 'Object at Rest', should illustrate a box on a horizontal surface with labeled force vectors for 'Fg' (Gravity) and 'Fn' (Normal Force), along with the text 'Fnet = 0'. Page 3, titled 'Object on Ramp', should illustrate a box on an inclined plane with labeled force vectors for 'Fg' (straight down), 'Fn' (perpendicular to the ramp), and 'Ff' (Friction, pointing up the ramp). Save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/physics_fbd.flipchart.
